common.soonDesc: This page will be published as content joins the collection. If you would prefer, you may write to the concierge by WhatsApp.

home.metaDesc: A boutique villa collection across the Bodrum peninsula — built on considered curation, preserved atmosphere and a measured guest profile. Arriving soon.
home.ogDesc: A boutique villa collection across the Bodrum peninsula. Selection, not scale.
home.heroUpper: From private-pool villas to sea-view apartments
home.heroLower: 50+ carefully selected homes across the Bodrum peninsula — Yalıkavak to Turgutreis. Instant confirmation, free cancellation, door-to-door delivery.
home.searchTitle: Pick Your Bodrum Holiday in One Click
home.trust1Desc: High & low season listed openly, no hidden fees
home.trust4Desc: Free up to 7 days before arrival
home.servicesDesc: Every piece of your holiday — handled by the same team, in one message.
home.featuredVillasDesc: Private-pool, detached homes selected for larger families and groups.
home.districtsDesc: Each district has its own character — pick the one that fits your holiday style.
home.why1Desc: We inspect every villa and apartment in person at the start of the season. Linens washed, AC running, pool clean — no surprises when you arrive.
home.why2Desc: From a one-bedroom flat for two to a six-bedroom villa for fourteen, you pick from one platform. Real options in every segment.
home.why3Desc: Prices are written by season, no last-minute changes. Our cancellation policy is fair — free up to 7 days before arrival.
home.why4Title: The whole holiday under one roof
home.why4Desc: Everything beyond accommodation — transfer, car, boat, tours — arranged by the same team with one message. Your plan stays in one piece.
home.reviewsDesc: Real reviews from Google and Booking.
home.blogDesc: Reads worth your time before you plan the trip.
home.intro1: Planning a Bodrum holiday now starts from a single place. Apartments and villas across both faces of the peninsula — the calm Aegean side and the lively Mediterranean stretch — give every family, couple and group the right home. A honeymoon under the boutique marina lights of Yalıkavak; a vibrant week at Gümbet beach with friends; a quiet family escape in the coves of Turgutreis — there is a home here for every scenario.
home.intro2: Villa or apartment? Two questions decide it: group size and how much private space you want. More than six guests, your own pool, kitchen and courtyard — go for a villa. Want a central location with a flexible budget — pick an apartment. In both segments we offer homes spread across the peninsula's districts, with real photos and transparent seasonal pricing.
home.intro3: More than accommodation. Summer in Bodrum isn't only about finding a roof. We arrange VIP transfers from Milas-Bodrum Airport, daily boat tours from the marinas, rental cars for free exploration, and guided tours into ancient cities — all under the same roof. One WhatsApp message reaches your entire holiday plan.
home.intro4: How booking works. Pick your dates, choose the home, fill in the form. Within an hour we call to confirm availability and share bank-transfer details. Your booking is confirmed as soon as we receive payment, and a confirmation email lands in your inbox. Free cancellation stays valid until 7 days before arrival.
home.intro5: We live in Bodrum and we know it well. Which area empties out at the end of season, which cove is calmest with kids, which restaurant gets the freshest fish — ask, and we'll share. We may sell accommodation, but our real work is to deliver the right experience.
home.intro6: Start your search now and arrive at the right place, on the right date.

faq.q1: What's the difference between a villa and an apartment, and which suits me?
faq.a1: A villa is usually detached, has a private pool and 4+ bedrooms — best for groups over 8. An apartment is a flat within a complex, shares a common pool, and works well for 2-6 guests. Pick a villa for space and group size, an apartment for value and flexibility.
faq.q2: Where are your private-pool villas located?
faq.a2: On the Yalıkavak hillside, in Türkbükü, Gündoğan, and the inland side of Bitez. Reach out via the site or WhatsApp for availability.
faq.a3: After the form is submitted, we reach you within an hour on WhatsApp or by phone. Availability is confirmed, then bank-transfer details are shared. The booking is confirmed as soon as we receive payment, with a confirmation email to follow.
faq.a4: Cancel 7 or more days before arrival for a full refund. Cancellations within 7 days are subject to a tiered fee.
faq.a5: Yes. VIP transfers from Milas-Bodrum Airport to your villa or apartment. You can request it during booking or reserve from our transfer page.
faq.a6: In high season (June-September) apartments require 3 nights minimum and villas 5 nights. Low season drops to 2 nights.

boat.metaTitle: Bodrum Boat Rental 2026 | Blue Cruise, Daily & Private Charter
boat.metaDesc: Blue cruise, daily boats and private charters in Bodrum. Departures from Yalıkavak, Türkbükü and the centre. Local captains, insurance included.
boat.subtitle: Daily boats, blue cruise, private charter — explore the peninsula from the sea.
boat.intro1: Coming to Bodrum without going out to sea leaves the trip half-done. The peninsula's best places — the aquarium cove of Karaada, the clear water of Orak Island, the hidden blue of Sandıma — are properly seen only from the deck of a gulet or motor yacht. All boats we offer work with local captains, current insurance and active inspections; transfer from your villa or apartment to the pier is included.
boat.intro2: Daily programs depart from Bodrum centre, Yalıkavak and Turgutreis. Boats leave around 11:00 and return at 17:00; breakfast and lunch are served on board. Three or four swim stops are made, with calmer coves chosen for families. Blue cruise packages run 3-7 nights along the Gökova Gulf (Cleopatra Beach, Sedir Island, English Harbour) or the Datça-Knidos line (Palamutbükü, Hayıtbükü); we recommend a route based on your dates and budget.
boat.intro3: Private charter is the choice for honeymoons, birthdays, proposals, corporate trips or simply a sunset cruise. Chef service, sound system, diving gear and water toys can be added on request. If you're hosting a group at the villa, we arrange the transfer and catering end-to-end.
boat.boatType2Desc: 4-8 cabins, 3-7 nights, full board, fixed or tailored route.
boat.boatType3Desc: Hourly or daily, captain + hostess, ideal for sunset cruises.
boat.boatType4Desc: Knidos ancient city, Palamutbükü, Hayıtbükü, Ovabükü.

car.metaTitle: Bodrum Car Rental 2026 | Airport Delivery, Insurance Included
car.metaDesc: Affordable and premium car rental in Bodrum. Delivery to Milas-Bodrum Airport or your villa. Full insurance, unlimited kilometres.
car.subtitle: Airport delivery, full insurance, unlimited kilometres — clear pricing.
car.intro1: Moving across the peninsula on your own clock is easiest with a rental car. From the boutique marina of Yalıkavak to the windy shore of Akyarlar, from the private piers of Türkbükü to the quiet coves of Mazı — we set aside a car so you can move freely. Through our partnerships with the major rent-a-car networks you find a car even on peak days; everything is fully insured with unlimited kilometres.
car.intro2: Our fleet covers economy to premium SUV. Compact manuals (Fiat Egea, Renault Clio) for couples; automatic sedans (Toyota Corolla, VW Passat) for families; SUVs (Dacia Duster, Hyundai Tucson) for villa groups that want to reach the mountain villages; premium (BMW 3, Mercedes C) for corporate or special trips.
car.intro3: Pick-up points cover Milas-Bodrum Airport (24/7), Bodrum centre, Yalıkavak and Turgutreis. Delivery to the villa door is free; if you prefer, we drive the car straight to your address. Return location can differ (pick up at the airport, drop off in Yalıkavak). Weekly and monthly rentals carry a 15-25% discount.
car.carClass1Desc: Fiat Egea, Renault Clio, Hyundai i20. 4 guests + 2 bags.
car.carClass2Desc: Toyota Corolla, Renault Megane. 5 guests + 3 bags, automatic.
car.carClass3Desc: Dacia Duster, Hyundai Tucson. 5 guests + 4 bags, high comfort.
car.carClass4Desc: BMW 3, Mercedes C, Volvo XC60. Luxury interior.

transfer.metaTitle: Bodrum Airport Transfer | Milas-Bodrum VIP Transfer 2026
transfer.metaDesc: VIP transfer from Milas-Bodrum Airport to your villa or apartment. Sedan, Vito and Sprinter — door-to-door service.
transfer.subtitle: From Milas-Bodrum Airport to your villa door in a private vehicle.
transfer.intro1: Milas-Bodrum Airport sits 35 km from Bodrum centre and 50 km from Yalıkavak. The first right decision of the trip is often a pre-booked VIP transfer — bags down, straight to the villa or apartment. Our drivers track flights and don't charge extra for late arrivals; all vehicles are air-conditioned with ample luggage space.
transfer.intro2: Vehicle type is matched to your group and luggage count. 1-3 guests in a sedan (Mercedes E or VW Passat), 4-7 guests in a VW Caravelle or Mercedes Vito, 8-16 guests (large families or honeymoon groups) in a Mercedes Sprinter VIP. Child seats are arranged free when noted in advance.
transfer.intro3: Pricing is fixed by district; you receive a clear quote when booking. One-way or round-trip is available; round-trip carries a 10% discount. No night or holiday surcharges. You're dropped at the villa entrance or apartment door, where our key handover team meets you.
transfer.vehicle1Desc: Mercedes E or VW Passat. Capacity for 3 suitcases.
transfer.vehicle2Desc: Mercedes Vito or VW Caravelle. Capacity for 6 suitcases.
transfer.vehicle3Desc: Mercedes Sprinter. Wide luggage area, leather seats.

tours.metaTitle: Bodrum Daily Tours 2026 | Blue Cruise, Diving, Jeep Safari
tours.metaDesc: Daily tours in Bodrum: blue cruise, diving, jeep safari, ancient cities. Local certified guides, transparent pricing.
tours.subtitle: Blue cruise, diving, jeep safari, ancient cities — discover the full peninsula.
tours.intro1: For guests who want more than the beach, Bodrum is a surprising library of nature and history: thousand-year-old ancient cities, hidden coves, dive sites, mountain villages. We work with local certified operators for every tour. All tours include lunch, insurance and transport.
tours.intro2: The blue cruise is the classic: a day along the coves by boat, three or four swim stops, lunch on the deck. Our diving tours suit all levels and a first dive needs no certification. Jeep safari reaches the inland villages, old windmills and panoramic ridges. Ancient-city tours cover Bodrum Castle, the Mausoleum of Halicarnassus, Pedasa and Knidos — with an archaeologist guide.
tours.intro3: Every tour has a minimum of 4-6 guests; individual bookings are joined with other guests. If you'd like to charter the full vehicle for your villa group, we set the whole tour aside for you.
tours.tour2Desc: All levels, no certificate needed, 60-minute single dive.
tours.tour4Desc: Bodrum Castle, Mausoleum, Pedasa, guide included.

about.metaDesc: Bodrumapartvilla is a boutique villa-stay platform across the Bodrum peninsula, working by considered curation and careful partnership rather than scale.
about.subtitle: A considered way of working, not a question of volume.
about.section1: Every villa is reviewed individually. A property is a whole — its architecture, its setting, its garden, its outlook all forming a single atmosphere. A villa joins the collection because it adds meaning to it, not because it adds inventory.
about.section2: Losing a villa's character to the rhythm of operations is, to us, unacceptable. Maintenance, housekeeping and guest flow are arranged to sustain its quiet, its privacy and its daily spirit — a measured rhythm that returns measured results.
about.section3: Every enquiry is weighed against the trust the owner has placed in us. The work of the concierge is to find the measured fit between the people sharing a stay and the temperament of the villa that will hold it.
